title: WakeResult / InboundDelivery.deliver result
description: The result of InboundDelivery.deliver(...) — for Cat.B, the /wake response. CORE INVARIANT: ok:true MUST mean the message genuinely entered the runtime's visible context. A false ok:true loses the message, because the SDK then commits the dedupe/ledger/sync markers and stops retry compensation. On ok:false (or a thrown deliver()) the SDK holds all markers and redelivers on the next /sync sweep.

runtimeSession.description: Optional identifier of the runtime session the message landed in.

retryAfterMs.description: Optional backoff hint (ms) before the message should be retried.
